code/experiment.html.description: Main experiment page — 8 A/B trials with randomized condition, confidence rating, RT tracking, CSV download

code/redirector.html.description: Landing page that randomly assigns participants 50/50 to control or AI condition

code/style.css.description: CSS design system — dark theme, micro-animations, mockup component styles for all 8 UI pair types

code/generate_sample_data.py.description: Python script to generate synthetic participant data with configurable effect sizes

code/run_analysis.py.description: Statistical analysis script — z-test, t-test, Cohen's d/h, 95% CI, SVG charts (stdlib only)

analytics/schema.md.description: CSV column definitions and schema documentation

analytics/dashboard.html.description: Interactive Chart.js dashboard with drag-and-drop CSV loading and 3 chart types

analytics/results.json.description: Structured statistical results from pilot simulation

analytics/chart_choice_by_condition.svg.description: Bar chart — % choosing AI-preferred option by condition

analytics/chart_confidence_by_condition..description: Bar chart — mean confidence rating by condition

analytics/chart_rt_distribution.svg.description: Bar chart — mean reaction time by condition

docs/README.md.description: Project overview, folder structure, quickstart guide

docs/RUNBOOK.md.description: Step-by-step operator instructions for running live sessions

docs/METHODS.md.description: Copy-paste Methods section — hypothesis, design, stimuli, procedure, measures, analyses, ethics

docs/DEBRIEF.txt.description: Debrief statement — explains manipulation and provides withdrawal instructions

docs/IRB_CHECKLIST.md.description: 15-point IRB-style ethical review checklist with risk assessment

surveys/SURVEY_CONFIG.md.description: Survey configuration notes explaining self-hosted approach and alternative options

portfolio/executive_summary.html.description: Printable 1-page executive summary with key stats, visual chart, findings, and implications

manifest.json.description: This file — complete file manifest with descriptions
